response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced full-stack and DLang developer but lacks the core mandatory requirements for this role. Specifically, they do not have the required 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows, possessing only a 7-month stint in C/C++ from 2014. Furthermore, their financial domain experience is limited to a brief period at a wealth technology startup, which does not meet the deep Capital Markets, Investment Banking, or Fixed Income requirements.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience with modern practices like TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development.
Proficiency in desirable skills such as scripting languages (TypeScript, Node.js) and Java.
Some exposure to the financial sector through previous work at a digital investment platform.
concerns: Falls significantly short of the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ development experience.
Lacks the required domain expertise in Capital Markets, Investment Banking, or Fixed Income.
No demonstrated experience with enterprise SQL Server or Oracle databases as requested.
